narrative:
St. Albans Twp township has 1,930 registered voters, with 43.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.7 percentage points.
